Powerline

Powerline is a test suite that's designed to simulate battery-draining scenarios.

Background Audio Playback

  • Podcast (Vorbis format)

  • Podcast (Opus format)

  • Podcast (MP3 format)

  • Podcast (AAC format)

Screen-on Video Playback (Single-stream)

  • VP9 - 720p

  • VP9 - 480p

  • VP9 - 360p

  • VP9 - 240p

  • AV1 - 1080p

  • AV1 - 720p

  • AV1 - 480p

  • AV1 - 360p

  • AV1 - 240p

  • .H264 - 1080p

  • .H264 - 720p

  • .H264 - 480p

  • .H265 - 1080p

  • .H265 - 720p

Screen-on Video Playback (Multi-stream)

  • VP9 - 240p + AV1 - 360p

  • H264 - 720p + VP9 - 240p + AV1 - 360p

  • 4x VP9, 2x AV1
